parameters.body: ={ "operationName": "ApiJobBoardWithTeams", "variables": { "organizationHostedJobsPageName": "{{ $json.slug }}" }, "query": "query ApiJobBoardWithTeams($organizationHostedJobsPageName: String!) { jobBoard: jobBoardWithTeams(organizationHostedJobsPageName: $organizationHostedJobsPageName) { jobPostings { id title locationName isRemote descriptionHtml employmentType updatedAt jobRequisition { department { name } } } } }" }
